author: sofiabod
name: Single-Pass Packed N-gram + Hierarchical Dirichlet CTW
blurb: Pre-compute order-13 n-gram tables from 80 training shards, pack in artifact (128K buckets, uint16). Single-pass score-first eval with hierarchical Dirichlet CTW mixing (per-order concentrations). 2-layer 128d neural model (vestigial). No two-pass, no self-inclusion.
